name: Lyle Lovett
abstract: Lyle Pearce Lovett (born November 1, 1957) is an American country singer-songwriter and actor. Active since 1980, he has recorded 14 albums and released 25 singles to date, including his highest entry, the number 10 chart hit on the U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Rob Mounsey
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with Bucky exactly once and that was on a record Lyle Lovett’s remake of “The Summer Wind”... I wish I had known him better. I know John. I haven’t seen John in a while but I know him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rob Mounsey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 9, 2025
